details.description: A grand white, two-storey colonial-era museum building with a large central ribbed dome (the Rotunda) and richly ornamented neoclassical/renaissance-revival detailing. The facade features arched windows with keystones, pilasters, dentilled cornices, quoins, and louvered shutters. An arched entry bay is at the right, and the building sits behind a manicured green lawn with paved walkways and a few potted trees. A mature tree frames the left side of the image; the sky is cloudy with patches of blue. In the distant right background, a modern block with a visible YMCA sign appears beyond the museum grounds.

details.description: A white neoclassical building with a large central dome sits on a manicured lawn, facing the viewer. The façade features arched windows on the ground floor with decorative detailing and pilasters along the length of the structure. A tree frames the left side of the image, and a paved walkway curves across the grass toward the building. The sky is partly cloudy, casting soft, diffused light. In the background to the right, a building with a visible YMCA sign is partially obscured by the main structure. Overall, the scene appears to be a formal government/municipal complex set along a riverside or park-adjacent area in Singapore.

details.description: A daytime outdoor view of the National Museum of Singapore, showcasing its distinctive Neo-Palladian and Renaissance architectural style. The building features a brilliant white facade with symmetrical wings, arched ground-floor windows, and pedimented upper-story windows separated by pilasters. A prominent central dome, clad in fish-scale zinc tiles, rises above the structure. To the left, a large mature tree with dense foliage frames the scene. In the background on the right, a modern white building with a red 'YMCA' sign (YMCA International House) is visible. The foreground consists of a manicured green lawn and a paved stone walkway leading towards the museum, set against a dramatic cloudy sky.

details.description: A grand, multi-story Neo-Classical building with a prominent silver-colored dome featuring fish-scale tiles. The facade is light grey and white, adorned with numerous arched windows, pediments, and classical columns. A large, well-maintained green lawn occupies the foreground, bordered by a paved walkway and a low stone wall. To the left, a large leafy tree partially frames the view. In the background, a modern building with a red 'YMCA' sign is visible under a cloudy sky.

details.description: Oblique view of a grand white, colonial-era museum building with a prominent central rotunda dome, rusticated ground floor, arched windows, and elaborate neoclassical detailing. The structure is set behind a manicured lawn with footpaths and small planter trees; a large tree frames the left side and a cloudy sky looms above. This is the National Museum of Singapore on Stamford Road.

entities.name: National Museum of Singapore
entities.notes: Singapore's oldest museum; current building opened in 1887 as the Raffles Library and Museum. Declared a National Monument in 1992. Distinguished by its central rotunda dome and richly ornamented neoclassical/Renaissance Revival facade.

entities.name: National Museum of Singapore
entities.notes: Major heritage museum of Singapore; extensively restored and reopened in 2006.

details.description: A white neoclassical building with a prominent central dome featuring a ribbed facade and a gold-toned cap. The structure has decorative pilasters, arched windows on the lower level, and a balanced, symmetrical facade with two wings extending to either side. In the foreground is a well-kept lawn with paved walkways and a low stone edge; a large tree frames the left side of the image, and a modern building with a YMCA sign is visible in the distance on the right. The sky is partly cloudy with patches of blue peeking through.

entities.name: National Museum of Singapore
entities.notes: Historic neoclassical museum building on Stamford Road with a central dome.

details.description: A grand white neoclassical museum building with a large ribbed central dome and symmetrical wings. The facade features rusticated ground level, arched windows with keystones, louvered shutters, pilasters, dentilled cornices, and an arched portico on the right. The building sits behind a manicured lawn with paved paths; a mature tree frames the view. In the distant background is a modern block with a visible “YMCA” sign. Lighting is bright but overcast, giving soft shadows.

details.description: A white neoclassical building with a large central dome sits in a manicured park. The façade features symmetrical wings, tall arched ground-floor openings, decorative pilasters, and detailed cornices. A broad staircase leads to a main arched entry on the right side. The dome is ribbed with a small finial on top. In the background to the right, a modern YMCA building with red signage is visible. The scene has a well-kept lawn, paved walkways, and a few potted plants, with overcast skies and patches of blue overhead.

details.description: A daytime outdoor photograph capturing the National Museum of Singapore, a grand white colonial-era building featuring Neo-Palladian and Renaissance Revival architectural styles. The structure is characterized by a prominent central dome with fish-scale zinc tiles and a facade adorned with Doric and Ionic pilasters, arched windows on the ground floor, and pedimented windows on the upper level. A large, mature tree with dense green foliage frames the left side of the image. In the foreground, a manicured green lawn and a paved stone walkway lead towards the building. Several people are visible walking near the left entrance. To the far right in the background, a modern white building with a red 'YMCA' sign is visible. The sky is overcast with dramatic grey and white clouds interspersed with patches of blue.

details.description: A vertical shot of the National Museum of Singapore, a prominent neoclassical building with a white facade and a large central dome. The building features multiple rows of arched windows, decorative pilasters, and a triangular pediment on its left wing. It is situated behind a lush green lawn with a paved walkway in the foreground. A large, leafy tree partially obscures the upper left corner of the frame. In the background, a modern building with a red 'YMCA' sign is visible under a cloudy sky.

details.description: A large white neoclassical building with a prominent central dome sits in a manicured park. The two-story façade is symmetrical, featuring arched ground-floor windows and rectangular upper-story windows framed by decorative moldings and pilasters. The structure includes a grand arched entrance beneath a rounded portico, with a domed roof at the center crowned by a small finial. In the foreground, well-kept lawns and paved walkways lead toward the building, with a large tree framing the left side of the scene. A modern YMCA building or sign is visible in the background to the right. A few people are present near the entrance, contributing to the sense of scale.
